title: The Bridgeville Empire
description: Adds a colonial invasion by a new faction known as the Bridgeville Empire, who will patrol and set up camps in your world.
body:
# The Bridgeville Empire
### The Bridgeville Empire set out to carve up your land for its empire. Will you be able to save your world?

> The Bridgeville Empire features a new faction with 6 separate variations to allow for a unique experience as the colonial forces work together in combat. They may be found either in patrols attempting to hunt you down or in any of the mod’s 7 unique new structures that can be found in the Overworld.
> 
![An aerial view of a War Camp with soldiers scattered throughout.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c07707926235820d698e522f23e8d44368e65caa.jpeg)
> The Bridgeville forces feature several different ranks, each with a unique combat element that combines to make fighting them a unique challenge. 
1. Scouts move quickly to perform hit-and-run attacks, but are too weak to be very effective alone.
2. Rangers will try to take you out from afar with their bows, though their poor accuracy can often be leveraged to damage their fellow soldiers. 
3. Soldiers can tank a lot more hits and leap out at you to deal strong damage, but are slow and can be easily outmaneuvered. 
4. Marshals are a rare encounter, but extremely dangerous, as not only are they strong, but they both increase patrol spawns in areas they are found and will call in reinforcements upon death.
5. Fetchers and Guards are similar to Marshals in that, upon death, they will call reinforcements to the area, making them a dangerous encounter.

![A cow wearing a colonial soldier's uniform is seen holding a spyglass and bow next to a campfire, with a village shown in the distance.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0e652c1b55230fd85041d5ac0df48958717275e_0.webp)

### More Details

- Patrols can rarely spawn near players and player-built structures, but their chances increase if a Marshal has spawned in the area or if a War Table, found in Bridgeville War Camps, has not yet been destroyed.
- Taking on War Camps is a difficult task, but it’s crucial to prevent an area from becoming completely overrun by colonial forces. If the War Table at the center of the camp is not destroyed quickly, the enemy’s presence will only grow stronger. Camps begin heavily garrisoned, with reinforcements likely to arrive once the attack begins.
- Bridgeville's forces are a difficult threat, but you are not alone in your fight. Iron Golems can often serve as a great weapon against Bridgeville forces. Additionally, Bridgeville has an interest in picking a fight with just about everyone; pillagers, zombies, skeletons, and even pigs also find themselves in the crosshairs of Bridgeville's invasion.
